post:
Nobody tells you this about investing:

"Your biggest edge is doing nothing at the right time."

Checking prices daily feels productive. Holding quality assets actually is.

Your future self will thank your boring self.

image.title: Nobody tells you this about investing
image.subtitle: Your biggest edge is doing nothing at the right time.

viralReplies:
One headline can hit four assets at once:
oil, gold, currency and equities.

The crowd sees panic.
Smart money maps the chain reaction.

If crude moves, India does not ignore it.
Inflation, rupee and sectors all feel it.
